title: My Little Seamstress
writer: Heitor Campos Monteiro, Armando Leite, Arnaldo Leite
actors: Maria de Fátima Bravo, Jacinto Ramos, Alina Vaz
plot: Aurora is a modest young girl, working as dressmaker for the women her popular district, near the OPorto cathedral. One day, through a hintz-dress design competition, she gets involved with a haut couture atelier.
